name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it's a new machine / toolchain / panel, note that it
may fit the [plugin model](https://madside.mikolajczyk.org/docs/extending/) — no
core change needed.

## Alternatives considered

Anything you've already ruled out.
